items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.7 mph at a -5.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Minnesota Twins, KC 8, MIN 6. Michael Massey led the night, 2-4 | HR, RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.7 mph.
items.title: Royals at Twins Recap
